name: Medical Named Entity Recognition (NER) System
about: AI-powered system to extract diseases, medicines, and medical codes from patient data images and PDFs.
descriptionPoints: Developed a Medical NER system to automatically identify and extract medical entities from unstructured patient data.
Processed images and PDFs containing medical records to extract diseases, medicines, and medical codes with high accuracy.
Implemented advanced NLP techniques and deep learning models for entity recognition in healthcare domain.
Enabled hospitals to digitize and structure patient data efficiently, reducing manual data entry time significantly.
Built robust preprocessing pipelines for handling various document formats and image qualities.

name: Restaurant Sales Forecasting System
about: Time-series forecasting model to predict daily item sales for restaurants and food courts.
descriptionPoints: Developed forecasting models to predict daily item sales for restaurants and food courts.
Implemented time-series analysis techniques to identify patterns and seasonal trends in sales data.
Helped optimize inventory management and reduce food waste by accurately predicting demand.
Built data pipelines for collecting and processing historical sales data from multiple sources.
Created visualization dashboards to display forecasts and help management make data-driven decisions.

name: Retail Store Analytics & Security System
about: Computer vision system for theft recognition, customer behavior analysis, and employee monitoring in retail stores.
descriptionPoints: Built intelligent surveillance system using computer vision for retail store security and analytics.
Implemented theft recognition algorithms to detect suspicious activities and alert store management in real-time.
Developed customer behavior analysis system to track shopping patterns and optimize store layout.
Created employee behavior monitoring solution to ensure compliance and improve operational efficiency.
Deployed real-time object detection and tracking models for continuous monitoring and analysis.

name: Smart School Management System
about: AI-powered system for footfall counting, attendance tracking, student recognition, and fight detection alerts.
descriptionPoints: Developed comprehensive AI system for school management with multiple computer vision capabilities.
Implemented automated footfall counting system to track daily visitor and student traffic patterns.
Built face recognition-based attendance system eliminating manual attendance taking and reducing errors.
Created student recognition system for automated identification and access control.
Designed real-time fight detection and alert system to enhance school security and enable quick response to incidents.

name: Automatic Paper Generator
about: Tool to generate exam papers automatically using AI logic.
descriptionPoints: Engineered an automated tool for generating balanced exam papers with unit-wise weightage, difficulty distribution, and RBT compliance.
Increased paper confidentiality by 35% by replacing manual paper-setting with dynamic generation logic.
Built a paper generator with configurable total marks, difficulty ratio, and question count - reducing faculty workload by 60%.
Implemented real-time question bank validation to flag issues like unit imbalance, RBT gaps, and repeated questions saving examination department 30% of their time during exams.
Built a dashboard for teachers to preview papers, track history, and monitor submissions - enhancing usability and transparency.

name: Mini ERP
about: ERP system for CT University for managing students and results.
descriptionPoints: Developed a university ERP for managing student registrations, results, and assignments - serving 1000+ active users daily.
Reduced manual work by 70% by digitizing student registration and document upload workflows.
Built a secure authentication and role-based authorization system, increasing data protection.
Created a result management panel for teachers, enabling easy insertion, calculation, and visualization of marks.
Implemented an assignment submission portal for students and an evaluation module for teachers - cutting paper usage by 90% and improving submission tracking.

name: Event & Task Manager
about: Manages events and task distribution with hierarchy and scheduling checks.
descriptionPoints: Manages event scheduling and task distribution while preventing conflicts.
Reduced scheduling conflicts by 80% using a smart conflict-detection algorithm and time-slot validation.
Enabled higher authority approval, modification, or cancellation of events.
Built a multi-level task assignment system with deadlines, notifications, and live status tracking.
Improved task compliance by 50% with deadline reminders and progress visualization.

name: Feedback App
about: Feedback management system for CT University.
descriptionPoints: Designed and implemented feedback forms for students and teachers.
Stored and organized feedback data using MongoDB for future analysis.
Created real-time charts and statistics for feedback insights.
Added authentication for role-based access control.
Improved UI for ease of use and clarity of form questions.

name: Student Connect App
about: React Native app to connect students with university resources.
descriptionPoints: Built a mobile interface to help students access university services.
Integrated notifications for academic updates and events.
Created a secure login system using Firebase auth.
Added timetable and calendar sync with device schedule.
Used TypeScript to ensure clean and maintainable codebase.

name: Ecommerce
about: MERN-based eCommerce site styled with Tailwind.
descriptionPoints: Designed a responsive UI for online product listings.
Implemented cart, wishlist, and order tracking features.
Integrated payment gateways and order confirmation system.
Created admin panel for product, category, and order management.
Enabled user authentication and secure checkout flows.

name: Reporting Form
about: Reporting form for onboarding 1st year students.
descriptionPoints: Built form UI for student onboarding and details entry.
Saved submissions in structured JSON format.
Validated fields and performed client-side checks.
Generated registration summaries for backend storage.
Improved speed of onboarding process through automation.

name: Snake Game
descriptionPoints: Implemented snake movement and collision detection.
Added scoring system and high score tracking.
Used Pygame for smooth UI and rendering.
Tested game loops and optimized key handling.
Packaged game for cross-platform execution.
